title: Tactical Stuff
body:
**Tactical Stuff is a forge mod for NVG goggles, knives, explosives, tactical armors and more.**

**Everything is craftable in survival**

This mod's main purpose to serve as kind of an extention for gun mods like **TaCZ** or **Vic's Point Blank**

**examples:**
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________
![Tactical stuff & TaCZ](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7c4c34b75ac0f29b22fdfdf075d5486ec50df0a7.png)
_____________________________________________________________________________________________________
![Tactical stuff & TaCZ 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1c1e316eabdcdd0486430f1011dcc7f7b22b710b.jpeg)

_____________________________________________________________________________________________________
It can work stand-alone, however it is recomended to combine this mod with gun mods or performance enhancing mods like ribidiium

This mod is great for anyone that's looking to improve their experience with tactical roleplay, build maps or just have fun.

**1.20.1 only**

 **contains:**

-NVG goggles
-Fast bump helmet
-NVGs on a helmet
-riot helmet
-plate carrier
-full ghillie suit
-M9 bayonet knife
-throwing knife
-breaching hammer
-grenade
-C4 explosive
-explosive detonator
-airstrike
-hostile soldier (mob)
-(more stuff coming soon)

**Showcase:**
